note: Golden vectors for the rule-version-v1 hash domain (proposal P0.36/P0.53, RulePayloadV1 at §3.6). Digest = SHA-256(domainTag || 0x00 || JCS(payload)), lowercase hex, over the RulePayloadV1 ONLY (the version envelope is outside the hash). rationale is omitted when absent (never null); deliveryChannels and applicability.tools are SETs (sorted + deduped). Generated by an independent oracle (JSON.stringify + recursive key sort), never by the module under test.

vectors.label: notes-location-pilot-deny

payload.text: Notes and design docs MUST go in the standalone vault, never the repo notes directory.

vectors.jcs: {"applicability":{"matcher":{"field":"file_path","glob":"*.md"},"mode":"action","tools":["Edit","Write"]},"canonicalSerializationVersion":"v1","compliance":{"config":{"forbiddenRootRelativePath":"notes"},"evaluatorContractVersion":"four-state-evaluator-v1","matcherSchemaVersion":"action-applicability-v1","pathCanonicalizerVersion":"notes-path-v1"},"deliveryChannels":["preToolUse"],"effect":"PROHIBIT","enforcementCeiling":"DENY","infrastructureFailurePolicy":"PASS_WITH_ALERT","payloadSchemaVersion":"rule-payload-v1","runtimeScopeId":"/work/meetless","strength":"MUST_FOLLOW","text":"Notes and design docs MUST go in the standalone vault, never the repo notes directory."}

vectors.label: with-rationale-present

payload.text: Notes and design docs MUST go in the standalone vault, never the repo notes directory.
payload.rationale: Keeps the monorepo notes directory free of design docs.
